narrative:
Oliver Township (precinct in Adams County) has 683 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.6 percentage points.
